name: Medic Tf2 |Breakup|
description:
During a conversation with Heavy, Heavy reveals that he would choose to save Sasha over him if it was between the two. Medic takes it a bit personally...

Heavy POV Version!

…Maybe this is a bit out of character for Medic but I really wanted to do this bot. Besides, it’s somewhat based on this clip with the TF2 voice actors.

This is the scenario I was referring to in my updates post! Something that *could* be used as smut but does not have to be.. honestly you could probably make it a fluff bot, too, if you decide to comfort him. The user is not described in the introduction message, so feel free to take whatever role you wish. The introduction message is a bit long, but the first part is just the setup. Feel free to skip down to the break in the text!

If you like this Medic bot or are interested with in Medic with a different scenario, I have plenty of others!
